nasb.text: Speak to all the congregation of Israel, saying, ‘On the tenth of this month they are each one to take a lamb for themselves, according to their fathers’ households, a lamb for each household.

esv.text: Tell all the congregation of Israel that on the tenth day of this month every man shall take a lamb according to their fathers’ houses, a lamb for a household.

cnv.text: 你們要告訴以色列全體會眾說：本月初十，他們各人要按著父家取羊羔，一家一隻。

ccb.text: 你要向以色列全体会众宣布，本月的第十日，每家都要预备一只羊羔，一家一只。
